---
title: "Option A — Post-Market Drug Safety Signals vs Public Attention"
author: ""
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
---

## Introduction

## Data Sources

- **openFDA drug adverse events (FAERS-derived)**: serious adverse event reports, seriousness flags, patient/drug/reaction data
- **GDELT DOC API**: news attention proxy (article volume and tone)
- **Wikimedia Pageviews API**: public interest proxy (daily pageviews per drug article)

## Methods

### Data Acquisition

### Cleaning and Alignment

## EDA

### Weekly Time-Series Alignment

### Cross-Correlation and Lead/Lag Exploration

## Preliminary Modeling

## Limitations

## Conclusion and Final-Project Plan
